notes: This record corresponds to the sequential full-program experiment using qwen3.5-plus.
Token accounting was enabled for this entire batch.
fast_reroute and load_balancer failed before testcase generation because the workflow could not obtain a stable task contract from Agent1/Agent3 under this model.
Successful programs still include fallback usage in some stages; intent-alignment judgments below distinguish confirmed vs fallback-backed cases.

programs.intent_alignment_note: The generated packet sequence covers the intended positive three-way handshake and the external-initiated negative SYN case.
The testcase is generated through the telemetry fallback path and skips entity generation; usable for continued experiments but not pure model-native success.
The fallback heavy-hitter contract produced below-threshold forwarding, threshold-exceeded drop, and different-flow isolation.
The workflow failed before testcase generation with 'Unable to obtain sufficient user intent to generate a task.'
The workflow failed before testcase generation with 'Unable to obtain sufficient user intent to generate a task.'
